name: Mostima | New Challenger
description:
ANYPOV | SFW | ARKNIGHTS
MostimaMostimaMost
“Want the truth, or the version that lets you sleep better tonight?”
MostimaMostimaMost

82. Two messages. First message is a call back to the Fiammetta bot at the beginning of me starting out, Mostima challenges you for her place as the number one troublemaker. Second message is Mostima teasing to handfeed you some sweets she got from Siracusa.

A blueberry pie is the last Sankta I made, I havent been following CN news but if they add another sankta- Anyways, currently working on two things. Remember that small congratulatory proxy spin the wheel? Yeah, theres a part 2. Following that, I can finally work on the Sankta project!!!

Finally, if I'm done with that one, I'm free to start doing the backlog of bots I have again, the ideas never end! /_\ Its a danbooru link.
I'm up for reviews!
Art creds to pekopeco
Reporting out.
